narrative:
Somerford (precinct in Madison County) has 761 registered voters, with 49.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.1 percentage points.
